description: Read-only status exposure of Core-A1 shadow evaluation results through the existing /api/state endpoint. This contract does not add runtime behavior, new API endpoints, UI wiring, broker integration, execution integration, or live trading capabilities.
statement: This contract is read-only status exposure only. It is not trade approval, not broker integration, not execution integration, not live readiness, and does not imply any order placement permission. The core_a_shadow_snapshot field is exposed naturally through the existing /api/state endpoint which directly returns engine.get_state(). No new API endpoint is added. No runtime behavior is modified. No UI wiring is added. No runtime state is written. The snapshot cache is an in-memory read-only exposure cache written only from the existing Core-A1 shadow evaluation loop.
